---
title: "Datasets"
author: "DD"
date: "2/15/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Datasets

[Market Dynamics of Products](../datasets/Market Dynamics of Products.csv)

[Product Characteristics Information](../datasets/Product Characteristics Information.csv)

[Product Reviews](../datasets/Product Reviews.csv)

[Reviewer Information](../datasets/Reviewer Information.csv)
